title: Marketplace Manager - Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited:
Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company Advisory Limited!
